title: 地牢100
description:
Dungeon 100 is a roguelite that combines the deep theory-crafting and player choice of classic ARPGs like Diablo and Path of Exile with autobattler gameplay.Key Features• ARPG Experience Without the Grind - No equipment and gear to spend countless hours grinding for. Instead freely choose from hundreds of cards to combine them in interesting ways for diverse character build possibilities.

• Unlimited Character Customization - Create unique skills by combining different effects of the hundreds of available cards. Transform into a bear that spits out dozens of flaming arrows a second, or summon hounds that can summon even more hounds, or play as a spin-to-win warrior! 

• Become the Dungeon Boss - Every 15 floors of the dungeon, there will be a dragon. Slay the dragon and you will become the Boss of that floor. You must then defeat your past characters to progress further into the dungeon.
description_short: The dragon-slayer becomes the dragon. Create unique builds without having to grind for equipment. After defeating a dungeon boss, you will take its place. Then, defeat your past selves to descend further into the dungeon.
